message:
feat(decision): add dependency-weighted loss scaling (Plan §5.5)

Implement loss scaling based on process dependencies:
- L_kill_scaled = L_kill × (1 + impact_score)
- impact_score computed from: child count, connections, listen ports,
  write handles, shared memory segments
- DependencyScaling config with tunable weights
- DependencyFactors struct for process dependency data
- compute_dependency_scaling() with full result for audit
- 13 unit tests covering all functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
